name: mysql-mcp-kit
description: MySQL/MariaDB MCP setup kit for safe, credential-file based database access with read-only defaults, write gating, audit helpers, and a db-access skill.

interface.longDescription: mysql-mcp-kit provides a generic Codex setup kit for benborla MySQL MCP access: local credential-file configuration, read-only defaults, write=true gating, optional audit helpers, templates, and a db-access skill that owns database access rules.
defaultPrompt: Set up mysql-mcp-kit for this project.
